name: Allied Cash Advance
description_short: Allied Cash Advance at 439 AZ-90 Suite D, Sierra Vista, AZ 85635 is Mon-Fri 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 284 reviews. Call +1 520-439-9171.
description_long:
Allied Cash Advance is a consumer finance company operating physical locations, including one in Mesa, Arizona, that specializes in small personal loans and emergency funding. The company has been serving customers through a network of retail locations and offers both in-store and online application channels. Their Mesa location at 2706 East University Drive maintains high customer satisfaction with a 4.9 Google rating across 379 reviews.

The company's primary offerings include installment loans (unsecured personal loans on fixed repayment schedules), payday/cash advances for emergency expenses, Netspend Prepaid Mastercard accounts, and refinance/reload options for existing customers. Installment loans can be used for major purchases, bill consolidation, or unexpected larger expenses. All products are available through multiple application channels: online, in-store, or by phone where available.

Allied Cash Advance distinguishes itself through rapid funding timelines (same-day if applying in-store with debit card, next business day for online applications), minimal documentation requirements, and willingness to work with applicants who have bad or no credit. The company does not pull traditional credit reports as a hard barrier and instead conducts internal underwriting. Staff reviews consistently highlight professionalism and customer service quality.

The company operates within the high-cost consumer lending space and does not publicly disclose APRs or fee structures on their website. While they market flexibility and speed, customers should understand this is a non-traditional lending product with rates and terms that likely exceed traditional bank loans. The website's current maintenance status suggests occasional service disruptions.

pros: Same-day funding available if applying in-store with debit card; next business day for online applications
Accepts applicants with bad credit or no credit history; considers cases that traditional banks reject
Minimal documentation requirements: photo ID, proof of income, active checking account, and phone number
Multiple application channels: online, in-store, or phone (where available)
High customer satisfaction: 4.9 out of 5 Google rating with 379 reviews praising staff professionalism
Flexible products: installment loans, prepaid cards, and refinance options for existing customers
Quick in-store application process (minutes to decision) with funding possible within 30 minutes using debit card
cons: APR, interest rates, and fee structure not disclosed on website; customers cannot comparison shop before applying
Non-traditional lender typical of the emergency cash market, likely with significantly higher costs than bank loans
Requires active checking account open for minimum 30 days; excludes unbanked or recently banked consumers
Arizona location requires proof of vehicle ownership; may limit applicants without vehicles
Website currently down for system maintenance per homepage notice, suggesting potential service reliability issues
best_for: Consumers with bad credit or no credit history who need emergency cash quickly
Employed individuals with active checking accounts facing unexpected expenses
Existing customers seeking to refinance or reload current installment loans
Borrowers prioritizing speed of funding over cost optimization
diagnosis: Allied Cash Advance is best for employed individuals with bad or no credit who need emergency funds quickly and have an active checking account, prioritizing speed of access over cost. The primary caveat is that rates and fees are not disclosed upfront on their website, and as a non-traditional emergency lender, the true cost of borrowing will likely be substantially higher than traditional bank products; applicants should request full terms before committing.
services: Installment loans (unsecured personal loans with fixed repayment schedules)
Payday loans and cash advances for emergency expenses
In-store customer service and loan counseling
Online loan decision and eSignature process
